794.title: Bargain Hunt : Newark 23
794.description: Presenter Natasha Raskin is in the driving hot seat, joined by experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. A married couple take on best friends, each buying three items which will hopefully make them a profit at auction. Natasha also heads into Nottingham to learn about the life of William Booth, the man who created The Salvation Army.
